content: The visual identity of AnimaOS must strictly avoid 'generic SaaS blue' to establish itself as a category creator rather than a follower.
The concept of a marketing 'Operating System' is more viscerally communicated as a 'Conductor' than as a 'Toolbox'.
Developed a narrative arc for the launch film that positions the user as the 'Architect of the Ecosystem' rather than just a software user.
High-concept storytelling fails if the bridge to a concrete product feature is too abstract; the myth must always ground itself in utility.
